env_summary: No production env, no receipt secret, default JSON store, no explicit dirs.
notes: Development readiness uses fallback receipt secret and does not require durable dirs.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, writable data/artifact dirs, no receipt secret, default JSON store.
store_result: blocked; JSON not allowed without override
notes: Minimum production requires a strong receipt secret and either sqlite or explicit JSON override.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, weak RECIPE_RECEIPT_SECRET=ks_receipt_live, KOLM_ALLOW_JSON_STORE=true, writable dirs.
notes: Weak production secrets are rejected even when storage override is set.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, strong receipt secret, writable dirs, default JSON store without override.
store_result: blocked; JSON not allowed without override
notes: Strong receipt secret alone is insufficient; storage gate still blocks.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, strong receipt secret, KOLM_ALLOW_JSON_STORE=true, writable dirs.
notes: This is a permitted temporary single-node production profile, but not durable multi-node architecture.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, strong receipt secret, KOLM_STORE_DRIVER=sqlite, KOLM_DB_PATH, writable dirs.
notes: Node emitted an ExperimentalWarning for node:sqlite; operational docs should reflect runtime support risk.

env_summary: NODE_ENV=production, strong receipt secret, JSON override, missing KOLM_DATA_DIR, writable artifact dir.
NODE_ENV=production, strong receipt secret, JSON override, writable data dir, missing KOLM_ARTIFACT_DIR.
notes: Code now accepts temp artifact fallback; tests/auth.test.js still expects not_ready.

env_summary: RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT=production, strong receipt secret, JSON override, writable dirs.
notes: Railway production flag triggers the same production-like checks as NODE_ENV=production.
